hook: Some social pain is tuition, not catastrophe.
body: The price of becoming more competent in dating is tolerating awkwardness long enough to outgrow it.

hook: Men often treat discomfort as proof they are doing something wrong instead of proof they are practicing something hard.
body: If the action is respectful and proportionate, discomfort may simply mean you are stretching capacity.
